name: Product Marketing Context Template
description: Full 12-section template for building the product marketing context document covering positioning, messaging, personas, competitive landscape, and channel strategy.
best_for: Building product marketing context; positioning document; messaging framework; persona development; competitive analysis; brand voice definition

name: Brand Selection Protocol
description: Protocol for establishing which brand to work on before any product marketing context work.
best_for: Starting a new session; multiple brands available; need to establish brand context

name: Check Existing Context
description: Process for checking existing product marketing context and SOSTAC files before building or updating.
best_for: Determining extraction vs interview mode; checking what already exists; SOSTAC availability

name: Auto-Extract from SOSTAC
description: Extract product marketing context from existing SOSTAC files rather than re-asking questions.
best_for: SOSTAC files available; extracting from existing strategy work; filling gaps only

name: Focused Interview Protocol
description: 3-round interview protocol for gathering context when no SOSTAC files exist.
best_for: No SOSTAC available; new brand; blank page strategy work; surfacing positioning

name: Document Operations
description: Writing, updating, and maintaining the product marketing context document.
best_for: Writing the document; updating sections; syncing with brand context; post-writing steps

name: Staleness Detection
description: Freshness signals and review triggers for maintaining current product marketing context.
best_for: Document freshness; quarterly review; staleness indicators; validation status
